title: calamus oligostachys
intro: Calamus oligostachys, also known as lesser calamus, is a type of plant species in the family Zingiberaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its root, which contains a compound called alpha-asarone, a natural insecticide and antiseptic. The health benefits of calamus oligostachys include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve anxiety and insomnia, and possess anti-inflammatory properties. Calamus oligostachys is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
